channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NCERT revises Class 8 textbook by removing judiciary corruption chapter
item.description: The National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT) has revised its Class 8 textbook, removing sections that discussed 'corruption in the judiciary' following Supreme Court directives. T...

item.title: Y.S. Sharmila pays tribute to Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy on his 77th birth anniversary, highlights his welfare initiatives
item.description: Andhra Pradesh Congress Committee (APCC) president Y.S. Sharmila Reddy paid rich tributes to her father and former Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister Y.S. Rajasekhara Reddy on the occasion of his 77th birt...

item.title: OnlyFans Creators Unintentionally Expose Hacked Government Websites
item.description: A Wired article reveals how OnlyFans creators are inadvertently exposing hacked government websites through their names being used as bait by cybercriminals. The piece details how hackers exploit popu...

item.title: Journalists Report from Suncorp Stadium During NRL Match
item.description: The article provides an on-the-ground report from Suncorp Stadium during a crucial NRL State of Origin match. Journalists Tom Decent, Iain Payten, and Christian Nicolussi detail the atmosphere, player...

item.title: Ogun Resident Petitions Police Authorities, Alleges Prosecutor Removed Key Evidence From Criminal Case File
item.description: A resident of Ogun State, Adejare Olasunkanmi, has accused a police prosecutor, ASP Matthew Famuyiwa, of collecting a bribe and deliberately removing 18 important exhibits from a criminal case file, a...

item.title: EU-SARAH Stakeholders Commit to Reducing Maternal and Child Deaths in Nigeria Through Collaboration
item.description: Government officials, development partners, and health experts have renewed their pledge to slash maternal, newborn, and child deaths in Nigeria through stronger teamwork, more funding, and better hea...

item.title: French President Macron's Syria Visit Overshadowed by Bomb Explosions
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron's historic visit to Syria was disrupted by multiple bomb explosions near the hotel where he was staying, highlighting the country's ongoing security challenges. The bl...

item.title: Nigeria's energy model: Scaling direct contracts to boost industrial growth
item.description: The article highlights Nigeria's existing successful energy model involving direct, guaranteed bilateral contracts with international clients and domestic industries. These contracts ensure reliable p...

item.title: Telstra Outage in Australia Disrupts Communication and Transportation Services
item.description: A major telecommunications outage in Australia caused by Telstra has disrupted communication services, internet connectivity, and transportation systems across the country. The incident, which began o...

item.title: Shifting U.S. Public Opinion and Political Dynamics in the Israeli-Palestinian Conflict
item.description: The article analyzes the growing political shift in the United States regarding Israel and Palestine, highlighting how public sentiment is evolving amid ongoing conflicts. It discusses the impact of r...

item.title: Police Confirm Kidnapping of FULafia Students, Rescue One Amid Ongoing Search
item.description: The police have confirmed the abduction of three students from the Federal University of Lafia (FULafia) in Nasarawa State by suspected armed militants. The incident was reported to authorities by the...

item.title: PM meets Pacific leaders amid China tensions during Origin decider
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese is hosting Pacific leaders, including Papua New Guinea's James Marape, Tonga's Fatafehi Fakafānua, and Samoa's La’auli Leuatea Schmidt, during the State of Origin decid...

item.title: Top 9 Setting Sprays for All-Day Wear and Sweat-Proof Makeup
item.description: This article provides an in-depth review of the top nine setting sprays designed for long-lasting, sweat-resistant makeup application. The products are categorized based on their key features: hydrati...

item.title: ED freezes ₹440 crore in TMC bank deposits as part of money laundering investigation
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has frozen bank deposits worth approximately ₹440 crore belonging to the All India Trinamool Congress (TMC) in Kolkata under the provisions of the Prevention of Money ...

item.title: Jimi Wanjigi Criticizes Ruto for Unfulfilled 2022 Promises and Calls for Economic Reform
item.description: Safina Party leader Jimi Wanjigi held a town hall meeting in Nakuru County, criticizing President William Ruto for failing to deliver on his 2022 campaign promises. Wanjigi urged Ruto to focus on dome...

item.title: Constitutional Court Ruling Invalidates Sections of Refugees Act, Protects Asylum Seekers' Rights
item.description: The Constitutional Court has confirmed a high court ruling that invalidates sections of the Refugees Act and Refugee Regulations, which were used to unlawfully bar asylum seekers from accessing the as...

item.title: Madlanga Inquiry Reveals Growing Fallout as Arrests, Resignations and Investigations Continue in South Africa
item.description: Mwaka mmoja baada ya Mkuu wa Polisi wa KwaZulu-Natal, Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, kutoa madai mazito kwamba mitandao ya uhalifu imepenya ndani ya Jeshi la Polisi la Afrika Kusini na kwamba baadhi ya wanasiasa...

item.title: Nigeria Police Procures 10 Toyota Prados for N1.74 Billion Under New IGP Disu
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force, led by Inspector-General of Police Olatunji Rilwan Disu, spent a staggering N1.74 billion in a single day on the procurement of 10 Toyota Land Cruiser Prado V6 2024 model SUV...

item.title: US-Iran tensions escalate as Trump ends nuclear deal talks amid aviation warnings
item.description: President Donald Trump has declared the interim agreement with Iran effectively over, accusing Tehran of acting in bad faith and refusing to honor commitments. During a NATO summit, Trump dismissed fu...

item.title: DG ISPR details security challenges in Balochistan amid terrorist attacks
item.description: The DG ISPR provided an update on the security situation in Balochistan, highlighting recent terrorist incidents and military responses. Three major attacks occurred in the past four days, with the fi...
